title: Principal Frontend Developer at Capgemini India Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at Capgemini India Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Capgemini India Consulting Pvt Ltd, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Hyderabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Capgemini India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Capgemini India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Capgemini India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
